transcript:
SOURCE: Fathom (via HubSpot internal notes) — https://fathom.video/share/fgW2h1h_b1U7KgpEosJZ34-p-BQteyMY

AI Meeting Summary ✨

Generated by Fathom // View Recording (28 mins - No highlights)

Meeting Purpose

Explore SMB Team's marketing services for a PI firm.

Key Takeaways

Goal: Add 5–10 new PI cases/month to the firm's current 15–30/month, increasing profit.

Strategy: SMB Team proposed a multi-channel marketing system (PPC, LSAs, ChatGPT ads, AIO) to replace the firm's current fragmented vendors.

Budget: The firm's ~$25k/month marketing budget will be reallocated to fund the new system, which prioritizes quality leads matching the firm's specific case criteria (e.g., soft tissue with >$1,500 vehicle damage).

Next Step: A follow-up call is set for Monday to review a formal proposal and pricing.

Topics

Firm's Current State & Goals

Firm Profile: 6 staff (2 attorneys, 4 paralegals) in Tucson, AZ.

Case Volume: Inconsistent 15–30 new cases/month, impacted by political ad seasons.

Marketing Spend: ~$25,000/month across multiple vendors (TV, radio, social media, website).

Intake Process: 24/7 answering service with immediate follow-up; firm is selective on cases.

Primary Goal: Increase profit by adding 5–10 high-quality cases/month.

Proposed Marketing Strategy

Approach: A multi-channel system to build brand awareness and deliver quality leads, replacing the firm's current vendors.

Key Channels:

PPC & LSAs: Google paid ads.

Social Ads: Retargeting and general ads on Facebook/Instagram.

ChatGPT Ads: Geo-targeted ads on the free version of ChatGPT (new, low-competition channel).

AIO (AI Optimization): Organic optimization for AI search queries (e.g., "best PI lawyer in Tucson").

Video Avatars: AI-generated content from a single recording to create years of posts.

Scope: SMB Team does not offer standalone social media management or email marketing.

SMB Team's Full Service Offering

Core Business: A "law firm growth acceleration system" that includes:

Full-service digital marketing.

Business coaching.

Fractional services (COO, CFO, CTO).

Fractional CTO: Builds custom automations (e.g., AI settlement demands, intake voice agents) to improve efficiency and reduce costs.

Next Steps

Jacob Meissner:

Send meeting recap email and calendar invite for the follow-up.

Scope a proposal for adding 5–10 new cases/month using the firm's existing ~$25k budget.

jwilliams:

Confirm the firm's annual revenue and marketing spend with Robert.

Ask Robert for specific revenue goals.

Both:

Meet Monday, July 27, at 10:00 AM AZ Time to review the proposal.

Action Items

Scope AI/Google opps; prep findings for next call w/ Jeff - WATCH (5 secs)
Email Jacob: prior-year revenue, current-year target, monthly marketing spend, intake conversion rates - WATCH (5 secs)
Send calendar invite to Jeff for Mon 10:00 AZ; include recap email - WATCH (5 secs)
Email Jacob names/emails of any additional attendees for Mon call - WATCH (5 secs)
Ask Robert for revenue goals; share w/ Jacob - WATCH (5 secs)
